acrostic: JESUS THE ANOINTED KING OF ISRAEL

2.acrostic: EAST MAGI STAR, OUT, BOY, NAZAR

4.acrostic: UPON THE WORD, RETURN, CALLS, AID

5.acrostic: SERMON STARTS, SALT, LAWS, MURDER, LUST, NO, OATHS, LOVE ENEMIES

6.acrostic: TELL, LORD'S PRAYER, EAT, GEM, EYE, DO NOT WORRY

7.acrostic: HIS EYE, ASKING, IN, FRUIT TREE, ROCK, AS

8.acrostic: EXAM, CENTURION, HEAL, COSTS, STORM, DEMONIC

9.acrostic: ABSOLVED, MERCY, AT, ON, DAUGHTERS, SEE SPEAK, SEND

10.acrostic: NAME, GO PREACHING, PERSECUTED, VALUED, HE, SWORDS, CUP

11.acrostic: OFFER JOHN THE BAPTIST, WOE TO, MY YOKE

12.acrostic: INNOCENT, WITHER, PROPHET, DIVISIONS, BE, FRUIT, JONAH, DRY, MY FAM

13.acrostic: NEW GROWTH, PARABLES?, DECODE, WEEDS IN, IN, A, TO, WEEDS ARE, HID, SORTED, DOUBTS

14.acrostic: THE BEHEADING, FEED FIVE K, WALKS ON WATER, ILL

15.acrostic: EAT SOILED, WHAT DEFILES, ONLY JEWS, FOUR K MEN FED

16.acrostic: DO SEE, BAD YEAST, DECLARES, DIE, DENY

17.acrostic: KING GLORIFIED, HEAL SON, DIE, COIN

18.acrostic: IS BEST, SIN, SHEEP, LISTEN, PAY ME WHAT IS OWED

19.acrostic: NOT TO DIVORCE, LET, RICH MAN GOES AWAY

20.acrostic: GIVE SAME DAY'S WAGE, DIE, SERVE MANY, HEALED

21.acrostic: ON A COLT FOAL, TEMPLE, FAITH, ASKED, WHICH, TENANTS KILL SON

22.acrostic: FOUND NO GARMENT, RENDER TO, FOR GOD LIVES, LOVE GOD, MY LORD

23.acrostic: IT IS HUMILITY, IGNORED JUSTICE MERCY FAITH, HEN

24.acrostic: SEE, SIGNS OF ENDS, SEE ABOMINATION, SKY, NEAR, STAY AWAKE, SERVANT

25.acrostic: READY WITH LAMP, REAP WITHOUT SOWING, RIGHT HAND IS SHEEP

26.acrostic: A PLOT, ANOINTED, ASK, ANSWER HIM, A BODY, A COCK, ARE SLEEPING, ALL FLED HIM, ANSWEREST NOT, A DENIAL

27.acrostic: ELDERS PAID, ENVY DELIVERED HIM, ENTER, ENEMIES MOCKED, EVENTS SCARED, EVENS, ERROR

28.acrostic: LOOK AT TOMB, LYING, LO I AM
